title: NDF Metric Gaming Playbook
description: Detect and close metric gaming after NDF (no-defect-found) tracking: techs route replacements through SKUs that skip test or auto-credit.

mindset.principle: The minute a metric scores people, rational techs find the hole. Design the scoreboard or they will design the workaround.

mistakes.label: Publish NDF by tech without mapping which SKUs are tested
mistakes.cost: Volume shifts to untested parts; metric looks better while waste rises

mistakes.label: Punish techs for gaming without fixing the hole
mistakes.cost: New hole appears next week; trust dies

mistakes.label: Leave auto-credit or no-test paths open on notorious SKUs
mistakes.cost: When in doubt, throw the free part becomes culture

gaming_signals.label: Outbound mix shifts to SKUs known not to hit NDF bench
NDF rate improves while parts cost or RMA volume climbs
Floor talk names a SKU as safe to send
RMA or depot skips test and ships to vendor for credit

decision_branches.situation: NDF tracking exists but test coverage by SKU is unknown
One SKU volume spikes after NDF scoring starts
Back end auto-credits a commodity without test
Techs describe a safe part to throw

steps.name: Map test coverage by SKU family
steps.goal: Know what hits the bench vs skips

steps.name: Compare outbound mix pre/post NDF score
Close holes (must-test or remove auto-credit)
steps.goal: Same rules for all high-volume FRUs

steps.name: Re-measure NDF and parts cost together
steps.goal: Metric and waste move in the open

agent_signal.use_when: NDF scoring started and outbound mix shifted to certain SKUs. Suspect untested or auto-credit paths. Need to close gaming without pure blame.
decision_criteria: Map test coverage before scoring individuals hard.
Treat untested/auto-credit SKUs as scoreboard holes.
Pair NDF % with parts cost so green metrics cannot hide waste.
agent_signal.operator_context: Field pattern: support always follows incentives. Measure creates the next game unless coverage is designed.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic job spine comms. Not a substitute for mf-tpl-060 return log basics. Not legal advice.
trigger_phrases: NDF scoring started and outbound mix shifted to certain SKUs. Suspect untested o
Need playbook: NDF Metric Gaming Playbook
